messages.author: VulcanCowboy
messages.text: This the place to ask for this? I'm not sure how hard it'd be. MT has it built. Be really fun to see it with MC. https://github.com/meshcore-dev/MeshCore/issues/1268 I'm not sure how to get MC compiled to work with this device.

messages.author: VulcanCowboy
messages.text: After trying Gemini, I tried the MS bot which was a ton of wasted time. Decided to try Google again today. Amazingly, I got it functioning as a basic companion node just moments ago. Need to adjust power output, see if it can read voltage, and maybe try getting the screen & keyboard to work but ... IT WORKS with the app! I'm not great at any of this type of coding. Still open to input. Can share files used to get it to this point in the next day or so when I get more time. Way too much going on this evening

messages.author: VulcanCowboy
messages.text: It is interesting. I don't know if anyone else would have interest in using these but I have a few from playing with the other project. I don't know how many are left to buy online. Just wanted to make them useful for MeshCore and have partially succeeded. Some updates. Have got the clock/time corrected. It syncs with app properly. Display - instead of a mess it shows properly. Cannot wake screen yet though with buttons. Incoming messages wake the screen but do not show up except first one. Battery info works but isn't fully accurate yet. May update on the link above in some days from now.
messages.content_html: It is interesting. I don't know if anyone else would have interest in using these but I have a few from playing with the other project. I don't know how many are left to buy online. Just wanted to make them useful for MeshCore and have partially succeeded. Some updates. Have got the clock/time corrected. It syncs with app properly. Display - instead of a mess it shows properly. Cannot wake screen yet though with buttons. Incoming messages wake the screen but do not show up except first one. Battery info works but isn't fully accurate yet. May update on the link above in some days from now.

messages.author: VulcanCowboy
messages.text: Fwiw updated comment on the link above with updated files. Can include a .bin if anyone wants. Feels like a much more functional device with at least 1 button working now to get the screen lit up and able to cycle through the basic UI. No idea if there's anyone here that has one of these who'd care to experiment with the code and see what they could do better. May be a stretch but would be really cool to see this "supported" in some way
